name: taskflow
description: TaskFlow — CRUD de tarefas com React, Express e PostgreSQL

scripts.dev: npm run dev:backend & npm run dev:frontend
scripts.test: npm run test --prefix backend && npm run test --prefix frontend
scripts.setup: npm run db:up && npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend && cp -n backend/.env.example backend/.env && npm run db:generate --prefix backend && npm run db:push --prefix backend && npm run db:seed --prefix backend
